tasks.label: Deploy All Sites
tasks.command: gh workflow run deploy-website.yml --repo vogyfry/tradesocial && gh workflow run deploy-website.yml --repo vogyfry/mylife && gh workflow run deploy-website.yml --repo vogyfry/private-network
tasks.detail: Trigger GitHub Pages deploy for all app websites

tasks.label: Check Deploy Status
tasks.command: echo '=== TradeSocial ===' && gh run list --repo vogyfry/tradesocial --workflow=deploy-website.yml --limit 1 && echo '=== Mavee ===' && gh run list --repo vogyfry/mylife --workflow=deploy-website.yml --limit 1 && echo '=== Pravida ===' && gh run list --repo vogyfry/private-network --workflow=deploy-website.yml --limit 1
tasks.detail: Show latest deploy status for all sites

tasks.label: Sync Landing Page
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'Update landing page' && git push origin main
